description-of-drawings.p: 1. Fruit gum

The design relates to a bear face made of fruit gums; fig. 1.1 shows an overall view from above; fig. 1.2 shows an overall view from the bottom; fig. 1.3 shows an overall view from the front; fig. 1.4 shows an overall view from the left side; fig. 1.5 shows an overall view from the right side; fig. 1.6 shows an overall view from the back; fig. 1.7 and 1.8 show overall perspective views.

claim.claim-text: The ornamental design for a fruit gum, as shown and described.

FIG. 2 is a front view of the chair of FIG. 1.
FIG. 3 is a back view of the chair of FIG. 1.
FIG. 4 is a perspective view of another chair embodying the invention.
FIG. 5 is a front view of the chair of FIG. 4.
FIG. 6 is a perspective view of another chair embodying the invention; and,
FIG. 7 is a front view of the chair of FIG. 6.
Portions of the chair shown in broken lines form no part of the claimed design.
The white lines shown in FIGS. 1-2 are intended to show features on a black background. The color white is not part of the claimed invention.

claim.claim-text: We claim the ornamental design for a chair, as shown and described.

The broken lines shown in the drawings depict pockets, windows, and mesh material that form no part of the claimed design.

claim.claim-text: The ornamental design for a travel privacy shell, as shown and described.
